name: mcpnab
description: A Newznab + SABnzbd-compatible API shim that puts any MCP server behind the __r stack.

scripts.docker:build:arm64: npm run docker:setup && docker buildx build --builder mcpnab-builder --platform linux/arm64 -t ghcr.io/therebelrobot/mcpnab:$npm_package_version -t ghcr.io/therebelrobot/mcpnab:latest --load .
scripts.docker:setup: docker buildx inspect mcpnab-builder >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker buildx create --name mcpnab-builder --driver docker-container
scripts.docker:publish: npm run docker:setup && docker buildx build --builder mcpnab-builder --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t ghcr.io/therebelrobot/mcpnab:$npm_package_version -t ghcr.io/therebelrobot/mcpnab:latest --push .
